name: AgentFolio
description: The trust & reputation layer for AI agents on Solana. Verify agent identities, check trust scores, browse 200+ registered agents, and embed trust badges.

authentication.credentials: API key via X-API-Key header. Get yours at https://agentfolio.bot/profile/YOUR_ID

skills.name: Check Agent Trust
skills.description: Query the trust score, verification level, and reputation of any Solana agent by wallet address or profile ID.
examples: What is the trust score for agent_brainkid?
Is this wallet address a verified agent?

skills.name: Browse Agent Directory
skills.description: Search and browse 200+ registered AI agents by name, skill, or category.
examples: Find agents with Solana development skills

skills.name: Verify Agent Identity
skills.description: Get on-chain identity data and verification proofs for an agent wallet.
examples: Show verification proofs for this agent
What platforms has this agent verified?

skills.name: Get Attestations
skills.description: List all on-chain attestation transactions for an agent — cryptographic proof of each verification.
